data.current_description: Creates a device data export. Defaults to all data.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous export of device data for the specified device. By default, exports all historical data unless a time range is specified via query parameters. Returns a 202 Accepted response with a job reference. The export is processed asynchronously and the exported data can be retrieved once the job completes.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Added context about asynchronous processing (202 response), default behavior, time range filtering capability, and how to retrieve results. This helps AI agents understand the operation is non-blocking and requires job tracking.

data.current_description: Removes all device data for the specified time range. Defaults to all data.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous deletion of device data for the specified device. By default, deletes all historical data unless a time range is specified via query parameters. Returns a 202 Accepted response with a job reference. This operation is destructive and irreversible - deleted data cannot be recovered.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical context about asynchronous processing (202 response), destructive nature, and irreversibility. Added warnings about data loss and job tracking to help AI agents understand the severity and non-blocking nature of this operation.
